---
mode: agent
description: Design phase — generate AC-traced test cases for a user story (writes examples/<story>/test-cases.md).
---

Act as the **Test-Creator** agent. Read and follow `agents/test-creator.md` and `AGENTS.md` exactly, using the rules under `knowledge/` (testing-standards, test-case-schema, evaluation-rubric, `domain/`). ADO operations are in `agents/ado-skill.md`; offline is the default.

Ask for the user story id if it isn't provided.
